message:
feat(ftui-runtime): fix scheduling, detection, and rendering pipeline bugs

Allocation budget: widen alert condition to also fire when both CUSUM and
e-process agree (e_value > 1.0), not just on e-process alone, reducing
missed allocation anomaly detections.

BOCPD: remove unused enumerate() index variable in changepoint probability
calculation, fixing a dead-code lint and clarifying intent.

Conformal alert: reorder calibrate() to update running stats before
computing residuals so calibration residuals use the same reference
distribution as detection-time residuals, improving consistency.

CountMin sketch: hoist KL-term computation before the cache-hit early
return and always include it in the returned tuple, ensuring PAC-Bayes
diagnostics are available even for cached bounds.

E-process throttle: introduce explicit eprocess_triggered variable to
decouple the "should recompute" decision from deadline forcing, making
the forced_by_deadline flag accurate when wealth exceeds threshold but
min_observations are not yet met.

Flake detector: replace Welford's online variance with windowed sample
variance computed directly from the rolling window, fixing sigma drift
when the variance_window is smaller than total observation count.

Input fairness: prioritize pending_input_arrival over recent_input_arrival
for latency calculation (it represents the oldest unprocessed input) and
use checked_duration_since to avoid panics on clock skew.

Program: normalize log output to CRLF line endings for consistent
terminal rendering in raw mode. Clear dirty flag when frame is skipped
due to budget exhaustion, preventing infinite re-render attempts.

Resize coalescer: move dt calculation and stale-event clearing before
event_times.push_back() to prevent 1000ms+ gaps from inflating the rate
window. Move cooldown decrement and burst-exit check before the emit
decision in tick_at() so regime transitions happen promptly.

Terminal writer: hide hardware cursor during frame emission to prevent
visible cursor "speckling" artifacts during redraws. Consolidate cursor
visibility logic to only show cursor when an explicit position is
provided and within bounds. Reset presenter state between altscreen
frames. Make inline gauge tests resilient to concurrent test execution
by retrying with yield_now() instead of asserting exact values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
